sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 20:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b846=load('governance/state/bem846_verify_bem840_response_after_retry.json')
missing=b846.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if not missing:
    status='process_real_bem840_response_next'
    next_action='read real Claude response and create agreed protocol document'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='repair_dispatch_result_writer_next'
    next_action='harden/force dispatch result writer and create result marker'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_runtime_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-847 retry runtime state after dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
else:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_real_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-847 retry real BEM-840 response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real BEM-840 response'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'bem846_status':b846.get('status'),'missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_route_after_bem846.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_route_after_bem846.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Route After BEM-846 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem847_route_after_bem846.json','governance/reports/bem847_route_after_bem846.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-846 and queued runtime/response retry when needed')
